# geocoding-kit Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-11

## Active Technologies

- Python 3.11+ + `arcgis` (ArcGIS API for Python), `pandas` (for CSV handling, optional), `typer` (CLI helper, optional), `python-dotenv` (optional) (001-arcgis-python-geocode)

src/
tests/
